creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
replace

name=${name##*/isc-}

with

name="dhcpd"    (in files/isc-dhcpd.in)
name="dhcrelay" (in files/isc-dhcrelay.in)

Furthermore modify called function names in dhcpd_rcvar.
This is my patch to get it work (net/isc-dhcp43-server is also affected):


--- isc-dhcp42-server.orig/files/isc-dhcpd.in    2016-03-16 09:35:10.286545440 +0100
+++ isc-dhcp42-server/files/isc-dhcpd.in        2016-03-16 11:27:38.000000000 +0100
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@
        ;;
 esac

-name=${name##*/isc-}
+name="dhcpd"
 paranoia=%%PARANOIA%%                          # compiled in paranoia?

 load_rc_config ${name}
@@ -307,7 +307,7 @@
        fi
 }

-rcvar_chuser ()
+xrcvar_chuser ()
 {
        if checkyesno paranoia && checkyesno ${name}_chuser_enable; then
                eval "${name}_piddir=\${__dhcpd_piddir}/\${name}"
@@ -317,7 +317,7 @@
        fi
 }

-rcvar_chroot ()
+xrcvar_chroot ()
 {
        if ! checkyesno paranoia || ! checkyesno ${name}_chroot_enable; then
                eval "${name}_rootdir="
@@ -327,7 +327,7 @@
        fi
 }

-rcvar_pidnleases ()
+xrcvar_pidnleases ()
 {
        if ! checkyesno ${name}_chuser_enable; then
                eval "${name}_piddir=\${__dhcpd_piddir}"
@@ -339,7 +339,7 @@
        eval "${name}_confdir=\$(dirname \${${name}_conffile})"
 }

-rcvar_rooted ()
+xrcvar_rooted ()
 {
        eval "_dhcpd_rootdir=\${${name}_rootdir}"
        eval "_dhcpd_devdir=\${${name}_rootdir}\${${name}_devdir}"
@@ -459,10 +459,10 @@

 dhcpd_rcvar ()
 {
-       rcvar_chuser
-       rcvar_chroot
+xrcvar_rooted ()
 {
        eval "_dhcpd_rootdir=\${${name}_rootdir}"
        eval "_dhcpd_devdir=\${${name}_rootdir}\${${name}_devdir}"
@@ -459,10 +459,10 @@

 dhcpd_rcvar ()
 {
-       rcvar_chuser
-       rcvar_chroot
-       rcvar_pidnleases
-       rcvar_rooted
+       xrcvar_chuser
+       xrcvar_chroot
+       xrcvar_pidnleases
+       xrcvar_rooted
 }

 dhcpd_precmd ()
